title: ESA Spent €82 Million to Launch Sentinel-1D Satellite on Ariane 6
summary:
The European Space Agency has disclosed that launching the Sentinel-1D Earth observation satellite aboard an Ariane 62 rocket in November 2025 cost €82,070,773. title: Improved thresholds and SSA accuracy can reduce most satellite collision risk
summary:
Improving the accuracy of space situational awareness data and using tighter thresholds for potential conjunctions can help retire most satellite collision risk in LEO, a new study concludes.

title: Twin NASA Control Rooms Support Artemis Safety, Success
summary: Twin control rooms at NASA’s Marshall Space Flight Center in Huntsville, Alabama, are actively supporting real-time mission operations in lunar orbit as part of the agency’s Artemis II mission, helping ensure astronaut safety and mission success as the crew prepares to return to Earth Friday, April 10.
